case_title: BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT vs. ABNEY, KURT et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT, DECLARATION, ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT JUDGMENT OF JUN-06-1995 SET ASIDE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ABNEY, KURT HAMPTON, ROBERT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 980 BUSH STREET, #301, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, LEASE FORFEITED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT HAMPTON, ROBERT
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ABNEY, KURT HAMPTON, ROBERT

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HAMPTON, ROBERT
